name: POLICY-BUG-20
title: policy spec.md + test cite stale rabbit-feature Inv 35
description: Wave 1 (rabbit-feature audit, 2026-05-23) renumbered rabbit-feature invariants. The read-comprehend-Write invariant for spec edits moved from Inv 35 to Inv 29. Two policy artifacts still cite the old number: .claude/features/policy/docs/spec/spec.md line 48 ('propagates the lesson of rabbit-feature Inv 35 from one skill to ...') and .claude/features/policy/test/test-rule-files-content.py line 61 (comment 'Phrase propagates rabbit-feature Inv 35 lesson via the policy preamble'). The citations no longer resolve to the cited content. Update both to cite rabbit-feature Inv 29 (or replace the numeric citation with a named reference more resistant to renumbers).

history.note: Wave 7 audit: replaced stale 'rabbit-feature Inv 35' citation with the named reference 'rabbit-feature's spec-edit Read-before-Edit obligation' in both policy spec.md Inv 6 and test-rule-files-content.py — resilient to future rabbit-feature renumbers.
